╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
║              FIRST INFORMATION REPORT (FIR)                    ║
║                  Under Section 154 Cr.P.C                      ║
╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝

  FIR Number       : FIR-2026-9080
  Date Filed       : 02 May 2026
  Time Recorded    : 10:50 PM
  

══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  SECTION 1 — COMPLAINANT DETAILS
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

  Name             : Rameshay
  Contact          : 890-054-7632
  Incident Date    : 2026-03-20
  Incident Location: 12Mg Road Chennai
  Incident Type    : Theft / Robbery

══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  SECTION 2 — CASE SUMMARY
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

  My name is Rameshay live at 12mg road Chennai, on 20th March at 9pm Nuran Nanagar Signal 2 men on a bike snatched my goal chain worth 50,000 Rs. my phone number is 890-054-7632.

══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  SECTION 3 — FORMAL COMPLAINT NARRATIVE
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

I, Rameshay, do hereby solemnly state and submit as follows:

That I approached this police station to lodge a formal complaint regarding an incident of robbery perpetrated against me.

That on the date and time of the incident, I was subjected to robbery by the accused who forcibly snatched property from my person. The incident occurred at 12mg road. The full facts of the incident, as narrated by me, are as follows:

"My name is Rameshay live at 12mg road Chennai, on 20th March at 9pm Nuran Nanagar Signal 2 men on a bike snatched my goal chain worth 50,000 Rs. my phone number is 890-054-7632."

That the said act constitutes a cognizable offence under the relevant provisions of the Indian Penal Code and I hereby request that an FIR be registered and appropriate legal action be initiated against the accused.

Identification and arrest of the accused and recovery of stolen property is urgently required.

I hereby declare that the above statement is true and correct to the best of my knowledge and belief, and nothing material has been concealed therefrom.

══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  SECTION 4 — APPLICABLE IPC SECTIONS
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

  Section 392 IPC — Robbery
  Theft with force, threat or wrongful restraint
  Punishment: Up to 10 years + fine
  [Match Score: 3]

══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  SECTION 5 — EVIDENCE & WITNESSES
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

  Photo      : gold img.jpg (attached)

══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  SECTION 6 — DECLARATION
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

  I, Rameshay, hereby declare that the above
  information is true and correct to the best of my knowledge.

  Complainant Signature : ___________________________
  Name                  : Rameshay
  Date                  : 02/05/2026

══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  * Computer-generated FIR. Requires officer verification & stamp.
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
